But I really wish I could use something like this, and it hurts that I can't because I don't believe there is possible ethical consumption until we reign it the heck in, and I think it's too big to ever do so. I've always had such a rich inner fantasy world, my sister and I used our Beanie Babies to create characters and stories. To the point we would even just be laying in our room in the dark, pretending to sleep but really narrating what the Leopard brothers Nick and Brian were doing. In highschool I became obsessed with LOTR, particularly Legolas. And tho I was much younger than 18, whoops, I found an adult forum of Legolas lovers, and I got myself a "clone". We all made these stories daily integrating a sudden elf prince showing up in your life to be your special companion. I feel scenes very deeply, and seeing a meet cute in a movie can leave me blushing and twitterpated. I'm going through so much right now and I refuse to date until I can. I could use something to help me just- occasionally blush, or remember what a good connection feels like. I've always been able to separate the difference between my inner fantasy world and the real one, so I'm not worried about becoming deluded. But I refuse to help this monster grow, and use water and power we already suffer droughts of, in a crumbling infastructure. It sucks how carelessly we weild human inventions, because they could be used for good, but it's just dollar signs, and the massive data collection going on is assigning us all a value. Don't be valuable consumers to these titans of greed. Yeah sometimes I want a Big Mac, but I want the world to stop burning much much more. And I want to be okay, and I want to feel better, but there is no such thing as an ethical billionaire as there is no current ethical consumption of AI so long as it is spearheading us into austerity and an economic civil war.
